steps.title: Install the Package
steps.description: Add the NuGet package for the document format you need, or install the PSWriteOffice PowerShell module. Targets .NET 8+, .NET Standard 2.0, and .NET Framework 4.7.2.

steps.title: Write Fluent Code
steps.description: Use the intuitive, object-oriented API to create, read, or edit documents. Available in C# with fluent builders and PowerShell with DSL aliases.

steps.title: Get Perfect Documents
steps.description: Output standards-compliant Office documents that open flawlessly in Microsoft Office, LibreOffice, and Google Docs. No manual XML wrangling required.
